install: cd /workspace/web && npm install && ./node_modules/.bin/prisma generate && curl -sL https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64 -o /tmp/cloudflared && chmod +x /tmp/cloudflared
start: sudo service postgresql start 2>/dev/null; cd /workspace/web && ./node_modules/.bin/prisma db push --skip-generate 2>/dev/null; npm run db:seed 2>/dev/null

terminals.name: preview-tunnel
terminals.description: Öffentliche Preview-URL (trycloudflare) — falls localhost:3000 nicht forwarded wird
